<thought>
I am at row 02 column B and I am facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is safe, while the goal is farther ahead. Moving forward brings me closer to the goal without stepping into lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column C facing right (`>`). The cell directly in front of me is row 02 column D, which is a safe floor cell (`.`). Moving forward brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D and avoids the lava at column C below.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D, facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead is row 02 column E, which is a wall, so I cannot move forward safely. The goal is below and to the left, but first I should turn to face down toward the open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing down. The goal is at row 04 column D, directly ahead of me, but row 03 column D is safe floor and row 04 column D is the goal. Moving forward will take me one step closer toward the goal without entering lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down (`v`). The goal is directly below me at row 04 column D, and that cell is safe (`G`). I should move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
